name: ai-income-lab
description: AI活用事例から収益化パターンを抽出し小実験に変換するローカルリサーチOS

scripts.full: node scripts/collect_github.js && node scripts/collect_hn.js && node scripts/normalize_sources.js && node scripts/build_input_draft.js
scripts.daily: node scripts/evaluate_idea.js && node scripts/report.js && node scripts/idea.js
scripts.collect: node scripts/collect_github.js && node scripts/collect_hn.js && node scripts/normalize_sources.js
scripts.fix: node scripts/evaluate_idea.js && node scripts/report.js && node scripts/idea.js
